channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Trump says not ‘appropriate’ for Iran to participate in the World Cup in US
item.description: US president, who won the FIFA Peace Prize says Iran would be welcome but should not come for its players' safety.

item.title: Iran’s president sets terms to end the war: Is an off-ramp in sight?
item.description: Iran is asking for 'reparations' and a guarantee that the US and Israel will not attack in the future.

item.title: US military ‘not ready’ to escort oil ships through Hormuz, official says
item.description: Iran's Mojtaba Khamenei says strait should remain closed as Donald Trump claims US benefits from high oil prices.

item.title: Iran’s new supreme leader issues first statement
item.description: Iranian Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei has issued his first statement since being appointed.

item.title: Video shows moment Iran strikes US-owned oil tanker near Iraq
item.description: Iran has released video it says shows the moment one of its explosive-laden boats struck a US-owned oil tanker in Iraq.

item.title: Up to 3.2 million people displaced across Iran amid US-Israeli attacks: UN
item.description: UN refugee agency says forced displacement likely to increase as US and Israel continue deadly strikes across Iran.

item.title: Aftermath of US-Israeli attacks on Tehran
item.description: Explosions are heard for a 13th day in Iran, Israel and several Middle Eastern states.

item.title: Israeli attack hits civilians at Beirut beachfront: What we know
item.description: An Israeli strike on Beirut’s seafront killed at least 8 people and injured dozens more.

item.title: Bunker-busting bombs loaded onto US planes at UK airbase amid Iran war
item.description: The use of RAF Fairford by US forces highlights the UK's increasingly active role in the US-Israeli war on Iran.

item.title: Caught in the crossfire: US-Israel war on Iran fractures Gulf economies
item.description: As Hormuz chokes and defence costs soar, Gulf states absorb crippling financial fallout of the US-Israel war on Iran.
